name: Grafvitnir, the Hunger Made Manifest — Stage 3 (L8 Solo)

era-of-embers.note: Stage 3 of 3 — pure hunger and will and rage. 4-round survival counter. The seal closes at Round 4 regardless of Stamina.

biography.value:
Grafvitnir, the Hunger Made Manifest — Level 8 Solo

Supernatural, Titanic

Stamina 150 (fresh pool) | Speed: fills space | Stability 8

Turns: 2 per round | Free Strike: 9 | EV: 120

All form abandoned. Pure hunger and will and rage. Grafvitnir fills the great hall and the sky above it. He is no longer any shape — he is the space where a shape should be. His attention has the specific quality of a thing that has been waiting for a thousand years and is finally certain it has run out of time.

THE ROUND COUNTER (CRITICAL)

Grafvitnir must be held for 4 rounds. Each round, the Green Heart light grows brighter. The seal is closing. The party's job is not to kill him — it's to keep him contained until the seal completes.

Round 1: Green Heart blazing gold. The barrier begins to thicken. Unnatural cold retreats from the flagstones.

Round 2: Light brighter. Warm on the party's faces. Grafvitnir is screaming. The barrier densifying around him.

Round 3: Light intense. Gold, blazing, rewriting the sky. The cold Grafvitnir carries is being burned away. The barrier nearly restored.

Round 4: Light goes white. Clean, absolute, unstoppable. The barrier slams shut. READ THE FINAL READ-ALOUD. Grafvitnir is dragged back into the earth regardless of Stamina.

Main Attacks

Void Grasp (Melee, Reach 6): +6 vs Might; 14 damage, target Grabbed.

Hunger Pulse (Close Burst 4): +5 vs Presence; 10 damage, target loses 1 Recovery.

Free Strike

Crushing Tendril (Melee, Reach 6): +6 vs Might; 9 damage.

Villain Actions

Each usable once per encounter, max 1 per round; triggers at end of any hero's turn:

(VA1) World-Ending Swipe: All creatures in Close Burst 5, +6 vs Agility; 15 damage, Prone.

(VA2) Despair Made Flesh: One target, +5 vs Presence; target loses all Hero Tokens and is Frightened (save ends).

(VA3) Root Storm: Three separate targets anywhere in the hall, +5 vs Might; 12 damage each, targets Slowed (save ends).

Features

End Effect: When Grafvitnir starts his turn, he can take 10 damage to end one effect on him that a save ends.

Prison Madness: A thousand years of confinement. Grafvitnir cannot be Taunted, Frightened, or reasoned with. Attempts to negotiate, intimidate, or psychologically pressure him simply fail. He is beyond psychology.

The Seal Closing (Round 4): At the start of Round 4, the Green Heart blazes white. Grafvitnir's Stamina becomes irrelevant — he is dragged back into the earth regardless.
biography.director:
TACTICAL GUIDANCE — STAGE 3:

Stage 3 is about the clock, not about winning through combat. The great hall is devastated — ceiling open to the sky. Grafvitnir fills the space. The party fights in wreckage against the oldest enemy in Svellheim.

  • This is not a winnable fight by normal combat rules. The party cannot kill Grafvitnir. They must survive him for 4 rounds until the seal closes.
  • Damage matters strategically (reducing his offensive capability via End Effect trade-offs) but not for the victory condition.
  • VA1 (World-Ending Swipe) is the opener — overwhelming force statement. VA2 (Despair Made Flesh) is psychological escalation — strips Hero Tokens. VA3 (Root Storm) is targeted destruction before the seal closes.
  • Each round, describe the Green Heart light growing: gold → blazing → intense → white. The warmth increasing. Grafvitnir's screaming growing more desperate.

THE SEAL CLOSES: At Round 4, the light goes white. The roots RECOIL. Grafvitnir is pulled downward. The cracks seal. The undead outside stop — like puppets when the hand opens. The unnatural cold retreats. The Ever-Ember burns in the shrine. Kaelen's work burns in the east. Hrafnborg is warm.

Expected Duration: Exactly 4 rounds. The encounter should feel overwhelming, desperate, and ultimately triumphant.
